name: Sankarankovil - Wikipedia
snippet:
The town houses the Sankara Narayanasamy Temple. Sankarankovil is also 3rd is largest town in Tenkasi district. Sankarankovil. Punnai Vanam, Sankarankoil. Town.
Sankarankovil is a town in the Tenkasi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located on the eastern slopes of Western Ghats. The town houses the Sankara Narayanasamy Temple. Sankarankovil is also 3rd is largest town in Tenkasi district.

name: Sankarankoil Municipality City Population Census 2011-2026
snippet: Current estimated population of Sankarankoil Municipality in 2026 is approximately 84,000. The schedule census of 2021 for Sankarankoil city is postponed due to covid. We believe new population census for Sankarankoil city will be conducted in 2026 and same will be updated once its done.

name: Sankarankovil - grokipedia.com
snippet: Sankarankovil is a municipality and temple town in Tenkasi district, Tamil Nadu, India, renowned for the Arulmigu Sankaranarayana Swamy Temple, a major Hindu pilgrimage center dedicated to the composite deity Sankaranarayana, embodying aspects of both Shiva and Vishnu.
